capabilities.summary: PreToolUse hooks that BLOCK test weakening, snapshot auto-updates, and locked-test edits (H2/H3/H5).

liveness.probe: calibration/run_calibration.py exercises guards through the real seam

capabilities.summary: Mechanical red-test lock: /tdd-lock makes committed red tests read-only until a journaled /tdd-unlock.

activation.switch: /tdd-lock after committing red tests (doctrine default for feature work)

capabilities.summary: verify_citations.py — mechanical check that findings' file:line citations resolve and quotes match.
capability_registry.py — validate/doctor/init over capabilities.json; makes darkness enumerable (§6a).
grade_from_otel.py — /grade's telemetry seam; grades the cycle from tool logs, never self-narration.

activation.switch: enable Claude Code OTel export, then /grade (docs/telemetry.md)

capabilities.summary: Planted-error calibration of the verification agents on a live model (§13); scoreboard in docs/calibration/.

activation.switch: python3 calibration/run_calibration.py (weekly, David-run or scheduled; --dry-run is CI-only validation)

integration_debt.what: calibration history has never been seeded — first live run still owed; v2.0 is gated on >=1 month of live cadence
